issues.title: I hope the next version can provide the functionality of openai request and response formats
issues.body:
I hope the next version can provide the functionality of openai request and response formats
Thanks♪(･ω･)ﾉ

comments.body: @HappyToSummer Could you elaborate more on what specific functionality are you referring to?

> [@HappyToSummer](https://github.com/HappyToSummer) Could you elaborate more on what specific functionality are you referring to?

such as use https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/conversation-state?api-mode=chat openai‘s format

@HappyToSummer Thanks for the response. There are ways Spring AI achieves conversation state using Chat Memory and Advisors. 

The Response API support in Spring AI is yet to be added: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2962

> [@HappyToSummer](https://github.com/HappyToSummer) Thanks for the response. There are ways Spring AI achieves conversation state using Chat Memory and Advisors.
> 
> The Response API support in Spring AI is yet to be added: [#2962](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2962)

thanks a lot
